title: Oaktree 34" Number 4 Rose Gold
features: 34" / 86cm when inflated with helium or air.
Use for a 4th Birthday party or combine with another Oaktree Rose Gold Number to celebrate a milestone birthday or special occasion.
Combine with other Oaktree Rose Gold co-ordinated party products (18" balloons, banners, bunting, badges, candles, napkins and tableware) to decorate a Rose Gold themed party, event or celebration.
description: Product Description Oaktree 34" Number 4 Rose Gold Safety Warning Do not release outdoors or use near power lines. This balloon may conduct electricity. Misuse may cause personal injury. Inks used on this balloon conform to government standards that relate to childrens toys. Not suitable for children under 3 due to small parts. This balloon is reusable.
